title: Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty
description: Softening claims with modal verbs, approximators, and epistemic phrases.
summary_pt_br: Hedging: suavizar afirmações. MAY/MIGHT, TEND TO, APPEAR TO, ROUGHLY, ARGUABLY.

scenes.subtitle_en: Softening claims with modal verbs, approximators, and epistemic phrases.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Hedging: suavizar afirmações. MAY/MIGHT, TEND TO, APPEAR TO, ROUGHLY, ARGUABLY.

scenes.text_en: Softening claims with modal verbs, approximators, and epistemic phrases. Focus: hedging — expressing uncertainty. The results appear to support the hypothesis.
scenes.text_pt: Hedging: suavizar afirmações. MAY/MIGHT, TEND TO, APPEAR TO, ROUGHLY, ARGUABLY. Foco: hedging — expressing uncertainty. Os resultados parecem sustentar a hipótese.

scenes.title: Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty
scenes.body_en: Hedging tools: MAY / MIGHT / TEND TO / APPEAR TO / SEEM TO / IT COULD BE ARGUED / ROUGHLY / SOMEWHAT / ARGUABLY. Essential in academic and diplomatic writing.
scenes.body_pt: Hedging: suavizar afirmações. MAY/MIGHT, TEND TO, APPEAR TO, ROUGHLY, ARGUABLY.

examples.en: The results appear to support the hypothesis.
examples.pt: Os resultados parecem sustentar a hipótese.

examples.en: It could be argued that the policy is premature.
examples.pt: Pode-se argumentar que a política é prematura.

examples.en: Outcomes tend to vary across demographic groups.
examples.pt: Os resultados tendem a variar entre grupos demográficos.

exercise.question: Complete: "The results appear to support the ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "The results appear to support the hypothesis."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Os resultados parecem sustentar a hipótese.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
It could be argued that the policy is premature.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "It could be argued that the policy is premature."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Pode-se argumentar que a política é prematura.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre hedging — expressing uncertainty. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The data appears to support our hypothesis.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: It could be argued that this policy may fail.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: People tend to prefer other days.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The evidence suggests a modest correlation.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Hedging isn't weakness — it's intellectual honesty.

scenes.title: The cautious researcher
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the research claims. Use at least three hedging phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: At the academic symposium, a postdoctoral researcher presented findings with careful epistemic restraint.

paragraphs.speaker: Researcher
paragraphs.en: The data appears to support a modest correlation, though causation remains unestablished at this stage.

paragraphs.speaker: Reviewer
paragraphs.en: It could be argued that the sample size limits the strength of your conclusions considerably.

paragraphs.speaker: Researcher
paragraphs.en: Outcomes tend to vary across regions, which arguably calls for a longer follow-up period.

paragraphs.speaker: Reviewer
paragraphs.en: Hedging, at this level, is not timidity — it is the mark of a researcher respecting her own data.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Uncertainty, written well, is more credible than any overclaim could ever hope to be.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty". Softening claims with modal verbs, approximators, and epistemic phrases. The results appear to support the hypothesis. It could be argued that the policy is premature. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Hedging — Expressing Uncertainty".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.

sources.label: The Economist · Learning English
sources.pt_hint: Jornalismo econômico e político sofisticado — nível C1+.

sources.label: The New Yorker · essays
sources.pt_hint: Ensaios literários e jornalísticos — prosa rica.
